activationPolicy: Registry presence never implies skill activation.

skills.name: governance
skills.description: Governed software work: source-of-truth checks, routing, token/context governance, branch/PR discipline, validation honesty, and release readiness.
triggerCases: A governance run needs GSD Core and Superpowers status classification.
Task involves toolkit governance, source-of-truth checks, custom agent routing, source review, validation honesty, or release readiness.
Plain-language request needs professional engineering routing inside an opted-in serious project thread.
negativeTriggerCases: Simple one-off questions where repo governance does not materially help.
Requests to install or activate every tool without review.
Unrelated repositories without explicit governance opt-in.
conflicts: Do not duplicate Superpowers or Codex plugins.
Do not claim GSD Core or Superpowers were invoked unless their workflows actually ran.
Do not silently continue serious governed work without GSD Core or a declared manual phase/state fallback.
Do not silently fall back from native agent to compiled instructions for high-risk work.
Do not treat explicit opt-in as approval for writes, migrations, package changes, Supabase policy/auth/billing/deployment changes, global config changes, external installs, or broad plugin use.
Do not represent selected agents as spawned agents unless they actually ran.
skills.publicNamingNotes: Canonical public runtime skill. Old aliases were removed from active runtime in the canonical-skill migration.

skills.name: uiux
skills.description: UI/UX authority for visual polish, responsive behavior, accessibility, design-system consistency, workflow clarity, and browser-visible quality.
triggerCases: User asks for premium UI polish.
Dashboard, wizard, app, or frontend workflow UX improvement request.
Visual QA, screenshot, accessibility, or browser-visible quality request.
conflicts: Must not replace governance for safety/release/backend/security governance.
Must not install packages.
Must not claim browser QA passed without rendered evidence.
Must not copy raw external design/skill content.
skills.publicNamingNotes: Canonical public runtime skill. Old aliases were removed from active runtime in the canonical-skill migration.

skills.name: code-quality
skills.description: React, TypeScript, hooks, tests, build quality, maintainability, AI-generated code risk, and safe quality-gate routing.
triggerCases: Hooks, lint, tests, build, or AI-generated code risk is in scope.
Generated or changed production code/tests need cleanroom guard-pass review.
negativeTriggerCases: Requests to add packages or change package manager.
conflicts: Must not install packages.
Must not reformat broadly.
Must not change architecture solely for scanner output.
Must not create or invoke external clean-code, test, or docs guard skills from comparison sources.
skills.publicNamingNotes: Canonical public runtime skill. Old aliases were removed from active runtime in the canonical-skill migration.

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: Application security review: auth, authorization, tenant isolation, public/private payloads, secrets, supply-chain, and source safety.
triggerCases: Security, privacy, tenant, public payload, auth, RLS, secrets, or supply-chain risk is in scope.
negativeTriggerCases: Pure UI polish with no data/security impact.
Release-only work with no security question.
conflicts: Must not weaken auth or RLS.
Must not read secrets unnecessarily.
Must not run approval-required tools without approval.
skills.publicNamingNotes: Canonical public runtime skill. Old aliases were removed from active runtime in the canonical-skill migration.

skills.name: pr-release-gate
skills.description: PR and release gate: branch hygiene, checks, review feedback, release gates, publish readiness, and post-merge handoff.
triggerCases: PR, CI, checks, CodeRabbit, reviewdog, publish, release, merge, or post-merge readiness is in scope.
negativeTriggerCases: Primary code implementation without release posture.
Requests to merge with pending blockers.
conflicts: Must not push to main.
Must not merge with pending required checks.
Must not mark release ready without evidence.
skills.publicNamingNotes: Canonical public runtime skill. Old aliases were removed from active runtime in the canonical-skill migration.
